subcodes.first_line: O Jalál! With a hundred thousand tongues must thou render thanks unto the Beloved of the worlds, that He hath brought thee forth from nothingness unto the realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جلال بصد هزار لسان باید محبوب عالمیان را شکر نمود که ترا از عدم بعرصه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @thankfulness; gratitude, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution
